jsonLd.title: ProSport is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, ProSport in Gwalior is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ProSport:
ProSport is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ProSport!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
